name: Aunt Gen's Divinity
recipeInstructions:
Make only 2 batches at one time.
1. Combine the sugar, corn syrup, salt, and hot water in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and continue boiling until the mixture reaches the hard ball stage (254°F).
3. Do not stir during cooking.
4. Remove from heat and carefully pour the hot syrup over the beaten egg whites.
5. Continue beating with a beater on low speed until stiff peaks form.
6. Stir in vanilla and nuts, if desired.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper or a buttered sheet.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from the paper.
